ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hrrs" (
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HRR */,
  "hrr_label" TEXT /* Label or name of the HRR */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the HRR is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the HRR is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medicare_enrollees" (
  "enrollee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollee record */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HRR the enrollee belongs to */,
  "enrollee_count" REAL /* Number of Medicare enrollees in the HRR */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the enrollee */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the enrollee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medicare_enrollees_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hrrs ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reimbursements" (
  "reimbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reimbursement record */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HRR the reimbursement belongs to */,
  "total_reimbursement" REAL /* Total Medicare reimbursement per enrollee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., inpatient, outpatient, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reimbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reimbursements_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hrrs ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_a_reimbursements" (
  "part_a_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Part A reimbursement record */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HRR the Part A reimbursement belongs to */,
  "part_a_reimbursement" REAL /* Part A Medicare reimbursement per enrollee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., inpatient, skilled nursing, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_a_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_a_reimbursements_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hrrs ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_b_reimbursements" (
  "part_b_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Part B reimbursement record */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HRR the Part B reimbursement belongs to */,
  "part_b_reimbursement" REAL /* Part B Medicare reimbursement per enrollee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., professional, medical, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_b_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_b_reimbursements_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hrrs ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inpatient_short_stays" (
  "inpatient_short_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inpatient short stay reimbursement record */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HRR the inpatient short stay reimbursement belongs to */,
  "inpatient_short_reimbursement" REAL /* Medicare reimbursement for inpatient short stay per enrollee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* Diagnosis code for the inpatient short stay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inpatient_short_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inpatient_short_stays_diagnosis_code FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_code") REFERENCES icd_codes ("icd_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inpatient_short_stays_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hrrs ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inpatient_long_stays" (
  "inpatient_long_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inpatient long stay reimbursement record */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HRR the inpatient long stay reimbursement belongs to */,
  "inpatient_long_reimbursement" REAL /* Medicare reimbursement for inpatient long stay per enrollee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* Diagnosis code for the inpatient long stay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inpatient_long_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inpatient_long_stays_diagnosis_code FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_code") REFERENCES icd_codes ("icd_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inpatient_long_stays_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hrrs ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outpatient_services" (
  "outpatient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outpatient reimbursement record */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HRR the outpatient reimbursement belongs to */,
  "outpatient_reimbursement" REAL /* Medicare reimbursement for outpatient services per enrollee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Service code for the outpatient service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outpatient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outpatient_services_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hrrs ("hrr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outpatient_services_service_code FOREIGN KEY ("service_code") REFERENCES cpts_codes ("cpts_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_b_professional_services" (
  "part_b_professional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Part B professional reimbursement record */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HRR the Part B professional reimbursement belongs to */,
  "part_b_professional_reimbursement" REAL /* Part B Medicare reimbursement for professional services per enrollee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Service code for the professional service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_b_professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_b_professional_services_service_code FOREIGN KEY ("service_code") REFERENCES hcpcs_codes ("hcpcs_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_b_professional_services_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hrrs ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_b_medical_services" (
  "part_b_medical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Part B medical reimbursement record */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HRR the Part B medical reimbursement belongs to */,
  "part_b_medical_reimbursement" REAL /* Part B Medicare reimbursement for medical services per enrollee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Service code for the medical service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_b_medical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_b_medical_services_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hrrs ("hrr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_b_medical_services_service_code FOREIGN KEY ("service_code") REFERENCES hcpcs_codes ("hcpcs_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_b_surgical_services" (
  "part_b_surgical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Part B surgical reimbursement record */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HRR the Part B surgical reimbursement belongs to */,
  "part_b_surgical_reimbursement" REAL /* Part B Medicare reimbursement for surgical services per enrollee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Service code for the surgical service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_b_surgical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_b_surgical_services_service_code FOREIGN KEY ("service_code") REFERENCES cpts_codes ("cpts_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_b_surgical_services_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hrrs ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_b_diagnostic_services" (
  "part_b_diagnostic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Part B diagnostic reimbursement record */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HRR the Part B diagnostic reimbursement belongs to */,
  "part_b_diagnostic_reimbursement" REAL /* Part B Medicare reimbursement for diagnostic services per enrollee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Service code for the diagnostic service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_b_diagnostic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_b_diagnostic_services_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hrrs ("hrr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_b_diagnostic_services_service_code FOREIGN KEY ("service_code") REFERENCES cpts_codes ("cpts_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_health_services" (
  "home_health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home health reimbursement record */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HRR the home health reimbursement belongs to */,
  "home_health_reimbursement" REAL /* Medicare reimbursement for home health services per enrollee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Service code for the home health service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_home_health_services_service_code FOREIGN KEY ("service_code") REFERENCES hcpcs_codes ("hcpcs_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_home_health_services_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hrrs ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospice_services" (
  "hospice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospice reimbursement record */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HRR the hospice reimbursement belongs to */,
  "hospice_reimbursement" REAL /* Medicare reimbursement for hospice services per enrollee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Service code for the hospice service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospice_services_service_code FOREIGN KEY ("service_code") REFERENCES hcpcs_codes ("hcpcs_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospice_services_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hrrs ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skilled_nursing_facilities" (
  "skilled_nursing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skilled nursing reimbursement record */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HRR the skilled nursing reimbursement belongs to */,
  "skilled_nursing_reimbursement" REAL /* Medicare reimbursement for skilled nursing facilities per enrollee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Service code for the skilled nursing service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skilled_nursing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skilled_nursing_facilities_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hrrs ("hrr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skilled_nursing_facilities_service_code FOREIGN KEY ("service_code") REFERENCES hcpcs_codes ("hcpcs_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "icd_codes" (
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD-10 diagnosis code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ICD-10 diagnosis code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icd_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cpts_codes" (
  "cpts_code" TEXT /* CPT procedure code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the CPT procedure code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cpts_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "hcpcs_codes" (
  "hcpcs_code" TEXT /* HCPCS procedure code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the HCPCS procedure code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hcpcs_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "lead_researcher" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data belongs to */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
